name: Acctual

dos: Use Open Runde weight 600 for all headings 20px and above with -0.03em letter-spacing — the tight tracking is the signature compressed headline feel
Set primary action buttons to #0d111b with white text and 100px pill radius — never use colored fills for primary CTAs
Use #0098f2 Electric Blue exclusively for inline icons (checkmarks), rate callouts, and eyebrow labels — never for button backgrounds or large surface fills
Apply 16px border-radius to all content cards and 32px to large feature panels — radius hierarchy is a core part of the visual rhythm
Set page canvas to pure #ffffff and use #fafafa or #f7fafc only for alternating section bands — keep the page as bright as possible
Use Caveat 16px/600 for testimonial attributions only — it is a signature element, not a body font
Stack invoice mockup cards with slight rotation and overlapping offset to create the layered paper effect visible in the hero
donts: Don't use #0098f2, #6c56fc, or #f200ca as button backgrounds — the brand accent colors are decorative, not interactive
Don't use pure #000000 for text or buttons — use #1e1e1 for text and #0d111b for button fills; the near-black tones are deliberate
Don't apply box-shadow to feature cards — elevation is reserved for the invoice mockups and testimonial cards; flat surfaces are the norm
Don't use border-radius below 10px on any interactive element — pills (100px), 16px, and 32px are the only valid radius values
Don't use gradient backgrounds anywhere — the design is strictly flat with solid fills only
Don't set body text below #666666 — the neutral floor for readable text is Smoke, not lighter grays
Don't use more than two chromatic accent colors on a single screen — the system relies on color appearing as rare punctuation

colors.name: Ink
colors.role: Headings and primary body text — near-black with a slight cool cast reads as authoritative without the harshness of pure #000

colors.name: Carbon
colors.role: Body text and secondary headings — deeper than Ink, used where maximum contrast against white surfaces is needed

colors.name: Midnight
colors.role: Primary action buttons (filled) — dark navy-black instead of pure black, giving CTAs a subtle blue undertone that harmonizes with the electric blue accent

colors.name: Smoke
colors.role: Secondary body text, helper copy, muted descriptions under headlines

colors.name: Fog
colors.role: Tertiary text, nav links, subdued metadata — the lightest readable neutral before borders take over

colors.name: Ash
colors.role: Disabled state text, placeholder text, low-priority labels

colors.name: Mist
colors.role: Hairline borders, input outlines, divider lines — cool blue-gray instead of pure gray so dividers feel on-brand

colors.name: Paper
colors.role: Page canvas, card surfaces, hero background — the dominant surface, occupying the majority of every viewport

colors.name: Snow
colors.role: Subtle section backgrounds, alternating bands — barely warmer than Paper, creates gentle visual rhythm without darkening the page

colors.name: Concrete
colors.role: Muted surface fills, inactive chip backgrounds — sits between border and surface in the neutral stack

colors.name: Electric Blue
colors.role: Brand accent — checkmark icons, payment rate callouts, inline highlights, the single most prominent chromatic color across the page

colors.name: Iris
colors.role: Decorative accent and illustration fill — violet chip on invoice cards, secondary brand signal

colors.name: Magenta
colors.role: Decorative accent and illustration fill — pink chip on invoice cards, tertiary brand signal

colors.name: Leaf
colors.role: Green text accent for links, tags, and emphasized short phrases. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Coral
colors.role: Red decorative accent for icons, marks, and small graphic details. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

colors.name: Ice
colors.role: Tinted surface wash — light blue card backgrounds for highlight sections, soft accent backgrounds

colors.name: Lavender
colors.role: Tinted surface wash — light violet card backgrounds for feature blocks

colors.name: Blush
colors.role: Tinted surface wash — light pink card backgrounds, decorative highlight blocks

designSystem.imagery: Imagery is minimal and product-focused: flat-lay photography of office objects (keyboard, binder clip, red binder, Apple display) cropped at the edges and scattered around the page as atmospheric decoration. The dominant visual asset is the layered invoice mockup stack — rendered as actual UI, not illustration, showing real invoice data with brand-color icons. Icons are simple flat geometric shapes (circles for checkmarks, rounded squares) in Electric Blue. No illustrations, no 3D renders, no lifestyle photography. The aesthetic is 'desktop overhead shot meets UI artifact'.

similar.why: Same flat white-canvas approach with pill-shaped buttons, minimal shadows, and restrained use of color for functional accents rather than decoration
Same compressed geometric sans-serif headlines with tight negative letter-spacing, dark filled CTA buttons, and a near-monochrome palette with rare chromatic punctuation
Same invoicing product category with overlapping paper/invoice mockup photography and a clean white-surface aesthetic for financial UI
Same approach of using a single vivid accent color (blue) sparingly against a white canvas, with pill-radius buttons and generous card padding
Same near-black (#0d111b range) primary buttons instead of pure black, minimal shadows, and geometric typography with tight tracking on display sizes

surfaces.name: Paper
surfaces.purpose: Page canvas — dominant background for the entire site, hero, and most content sections

surfaces.name: Snow
surfaces.purpose: Alternating section bands, feature card backgrounds, subtle contrast surfaces

surfaces.name: Ice
surfaces.purpose: Tinted highlight blocks for payment info and feature callouts

surfaces.name: Lavender
surfaces.purpose: Violet-tinted card backgrounds for secondary feature blocks

components.name: Filled Action Button
components.role: Primary CTA — 'Send my first invoice', 'Create an invoice', 'Sign up for free'
components.description: Background #0d111b (Midnight), text #ffffff, border-radius 100px (pill), padding 8px 12px (small) or 6px 14px (nav), shadow rgb(36,38,40) 0px 0px 0px 1px + rgba(27,28,29,0.48) 0px 1px 2px 0px. Open Runde 14px/500, text #ffffff, letter-spacing -0.02em.

components.name: Secondary Dark Button
components.role: Compact dark action — nav-level CTAs and dense button rows
components.description: Background #0f0f0f (Carbon), text #ffffff, border-radius 100px, padding 6px 10px or 6px 14px. Same shadow stack as primary button. Used where a slightly smaller, denser button is needed in nav or toolbar contexts.

components.name: Outline Link Button
components.description: Background #ffffff, text #1e1e1, border-radius 100px, padding 8px 12px. No shadow. Functions as a ghost nav item inside the pill-shaped header container.

components.name: Feature Card
components.role: Standard content card for feature blocks and comparison panels
components.description: Background #fafafa (or #ffffff), border-radius 16px, padding 24px, no shadow. Open Runde 24px/600 heading with -0.03em tracking, body text 16px/500 in #666666. Sits flush on white canvas.

components.name: Elevated Card
components.role: Card with subtle elevation for invoice previews and testimonial blocks
components.description: Background #ffffff, border-radius 20px, shadow rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0px 1.78px 8px 0px + rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 0px 0.89px 2.67px 0px. No padding (content fills card). Used for the invoice mockup stack and the testimonial quote card.

components.name: Large Feature Panel
components.role: Full-width feature section with generous internal padding
components.description: Background #fafafa, border-radius 32px, padding 96px 48px. No shadow. Used for the 'We designed an invoice...' section and similar spacious feature panels that need to feel like standalone editorial blocks.

components.name: Tinted Accent Card
components.description: Background rgba(0,152,242,0.16) (Ice at 16% opacity), border-radius 16px, no padding or shadow. Used for payment rate callout strips and highlighted info blocks.

components.name: Invoice Mockup Card
components.description: Background #ffffff, border-radius 16px, shadow rgba(10,13,20,0.03) 0px 1px 2px 0px. Contains a structured invoice layout: 'INVOICE NO' label at 11px uppercase in #666666, 'FROM/TO' blocks with brand-color circular icons (Iris #6c56fc, Leaf #5d9c06), line items in a table with #666666 labels and #1e1e1 values. Stacked with slight rotation and offset for depth.

components.name: Star Rating Block
components.description: Five solid orange/amber stars (default #f5a623 implied) centered above a quote. No border or background. Open Runde 24px/600 quote text below in #1e1e1, Caveat 16px/600 attribution in #666666.

components.name: Payment Rate Badge
components.description: No background, inline horizontal arrangement: Electric Blue #0098f2 circular checkmark icon (radius 888px = fully round), followed by label text in #1e1e1 at 16px/500, rate value in bold. No padding, no border.

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.role: Expandable question row in the FAQ section
components.description: Full-width row with no background, no border-radius, horizontal divider line (1px #ccd1da or similar hairline). Question text in #1e1e1 at 16px/500, plus icon (+) on the right in #1e1e1e. Vertical padding ~16px, spacing between items ~12px.

components.name: Pill-Shaped Header Container
components.role: Floating navigation bar wrapping logo, links, and CTAs
components.description: Background #ffffff, border-radius 100px, wrapping the entire nav row. Contains logo + nav links (outline buttons) + login text + filled CTA, all arranged inline with 8-12px gaps. Floats above the hero with subtle shadow.

components.name: Logo Mark
components.role: Acctual brand logo — stylized arrow/chevron monogram
components.description: Two stacked chevron/arrow shapes forming 'A' or '→' glyph, rendered in #1e1e1 (dark). Paired with 'Acctual' wordmark in Open Runde 16px/500, #1e1e1e.

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.role: Small uppercase category tag above section headings — 'Used by 5,000+ businesses worldwide'
components.description: Open Runde 11px/600, letter-spacing +0.02em, text-transform uppercase, color #0098f2 (Electric Blue). No background, no border. Sits centered above the headline as a tiny blue capsule of context.

typography.role: sans-serif — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

Primary typeface for all headings and body text — geometric sans-serif with weight 600 at display sizes (64/48/40/32/24/20px) carrying -0.03em letter-spacing for compressed confident headlines; weight 500 for body (22/16/14px) with -0.02em tracking; 11px uppercase eyebrow labels at weight 600 with +0.02em tracking
typography.letterSpacing: -0.03em at 20px+ display, -0.02em at 14-16px body, +0.02em at 11px uppercase

typography.role: Handwritten signature font for testimonial attributions — creates human warmth against the geometric system at small sizes only
Secondary system font for small uppercase labels — only used sparingly where system rendering is preferred over Open Runde
Inter — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

designSystem.description: Acctual runs a white-canvas invoicing product on a near-monochrome foundation: paper-white surfaces, dense near-black text, and a single electric blue (#0098f2) used as functional punctuation for checkmarks, rates, and inline highlights. The brand voice is geometric and confident — pill-shaped controls, generous 16px card radii, and rounded invoice mockups floating against pure white. Color is deployed sparingly: most screens stay achromatic so the blue, violet, and pink decorative chips read as deliberate accents rather than noise. Typography is built on Open Runde at weight 600, with tight -0.03em tracking on display sizes that gives headlines a compressed, almost monolinear feel, paired with handwritten Caveat signatures for testimonial contrast.

Runde","Caveat"],"about":[{"@type":"Thing","name":"Acctual design system"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"Acctual website design"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"Acctual colors"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"Acctual typography"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"DESIGN.md"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"AI agent design"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"website design inspiration"},{"@type":"Thing","name":"Fintech design system"}],"datePublished":"2026-03-11T09:39:31.000Z","dateModified":"2026-03-11T09:39:31.000Z"}]}19:T5e5,## Quick Color Reference
- Text (primary): #1e1e1e
- Text (secondary): #666666
- Text (muted): #8d8d8d
- Background (page): #ffffff
- Background (card): #fafafa
- Border: #ccd1da
- Accent: #0098f2
- primary action: #0d111b (filled action)

## 5 Example Component Prompts

1. Create a Primary Action Button: #0d111b background, #ffffff text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.

2. **Feature Card**: Background #fafafa, border-radius 16px, padding 24px, no shadow. Heading at 24px Open Runde weight 600, #1e1e1e, letter-spacing -0.72px. Body at 16px Open Runde weight 500, #666666.

3. **Payment Rate Badge**: Inline row — Electric Blue #0098f2 circular checkmark icon (12px diameter, 888px radius = perfect circle), followed by label text 'Cards' in #1e1e1e at 16px/500, then rate '2.7%' in bold #1e1e1e. No background, no border, no padding.

4. **Invoice Mockup Card**: Background #ffffff, border-radius 16px, shadow rgba(10,13,20,0.03) 0px 1px 2px. Header label 'INVOICE NO 001' at 11px Open Runde weight 600 uppercase, #666666. Two-column body: 'FROM' block with Iris #6c56fc circular icon + 'Marble Studio' at 20px/600 #1e1e1e; 'TO' block with Leaf #5d9c06 circular icon + 'Charm AI' at 20px/600. Address lines at 14px/500 in #666666.

5. **FAQ Accordion Row**: Full-width row, no background, 1px bottom border in #ccd1da. Question text at 16px Open Runde weight 500, #1e1e1e, padding 16px 0. Plus icon on right at 16px, #1e1e1e. Spacing between rows: 12px.

designSystem.elevationPhilosophy: The design uses restraint with elevation: most surfaces are flat with no shadow at all. Shadows appear only on the primary button (for weight), the elevated card variant (for the invoice preview), and invoice mockups (for paper-like depth). The overall philosophy is 'flat with selective lift' — shadows earn their place by signaling interactivity or physical paper-like presence.

- Text (secondary): #666666
- Text (muted): #8d8d8d
- Background (page): #ffffff
- Background (card): #fafafa
- Border: #ccd1da
- Accent: #0098f2
- primary action: #0d111b (filled action)

## 5 Example Component Prompts

1. Create a Primary Action Button: #0d111b background, #ffffff text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.

2. **Feature Card**: Background #fafafa, border-radius 16px, padding 24px, no shadow. Heading at 24px Open Runde weight 600, #1e1e1e, letter-spacing -0.72px. Body at 16px Open Runde weight 500, #666666.

Address lines at 14px/500 in #666666.

5. **FAQ Accordion Row**: Full-width row, no background, 1px bottom border in #ccd1da. Question text at 16px Open Runde weight 500, #1e1e1e, padding 16px 0. Plus icon on right at 16px, #1e1e1e. Spacing between rows: 12px.
